'''Caton''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] on [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]].
